arts.ttl: Joe Cole slams West Ham's 'criminal' defending in first half against Chelsea as Julen Lopetegui's side endure nightmare start in London derby
arts.sum: Nicolas Jackson put Chelsea ahead after just four minutes after taking advantage of slack defending and the forward proceeded to make it 2-0 in the 18th minute.

arts.ttl: Fans fume after VAR denies West Ham a penalty against Chelsea because Wesley Fofana's grab on Crysencio Summerville was only 'fleeting'
arts.sum: Referee Samuel Barrott did not point to the spot but the incident was then reviewed by the VAR team. Following a short review, the VAR advised referee Barrott to stick with his original decision.

arts.ttl: 'Fantastic' Sancho impact at Chelsea making Man Utd look foolish
arts.sum: In just two games, Sancho has looked rejuvenated and Enzo Maresca has praised the 24-year-old's impact and discipline, which was allegedly a problem at Old Trafford. 'Fantastic' Sancho impact at Chelsea making Man Utd look foolish

arts.ttl: Why West Ham Weren't Given Penalty vs Chelsea Despite Clear Contact
